articles.title: At least 53 dead in Guyana capsized ferry disaster
articles.summary: 📰 싱가포르 최신 뉴스\n📢 At least 53 dead in Guyana capsized ferry disaster...
articles.content: "A total of 53 bodies have been recovered," Phillips told a press conference. "We've recorded 76 persons that were rescued as of 6 pm (2200GMT) today," he said

articles.title: Former MP Sitoh Yih Pin, media veteran Patrick Daniel appointed as non-resident high commissioner to Maldives, Sri Lanka
articles.summary:
📰 싱가포르, 기술, 국제 관련 뉴스
📢 Former MP Sitoh Yih Pin, media veteran Patrick Daniel appointed as non-resident ...
articles.content: Sitoh is also an independent and non-executive director of China Taiping Insurance (Singapore). Sitoh is married to Wong Wei Leng. They have two children. Patrick Daniel, a former editor and senior executive of Singapore Press Holdings (SPH), retired as its deputy chief executive officer in 2017.

articles.title: Police appeal for information on missing 13-year-old last seen in Tampines
articles.summary:
📰 법률, 환경 관련 뉴스
📢 Police appeal for information on missing 13-year-old last seen in Tampines
articles.content: He was purportedly wearing a green singlet and black shorts. Anyone with information is urged to contact the police hotline at 1800-255-0000 or submit information online at www.police.gov.sg/i-witness. All information will be kept strictly confidential.
